LandingPage.IntroParagraph1: The leading user and configuration management tool for OpenIddict.
LandingPage.IdentityServerError: Unable to contact OpenIddict{{error}}. More help can be found here.

Applications.Access: Applications the user has given consent to or currently has OpenIddict side tokens for:
Applications.DataEncrypted: Scopes may not show here due to OpenIddict data protection configuration

UserDetails.EnabledTwoFactorHelp: Depending on your OpenIddict implementation, this may not have any effect

Notifications.Support: Message Us At support@openiddictcomponents.com For More Assistance

InitialAdminCreation.LoginMessage: You can now log into AdminUI and manage your OpenIddict solution.

Clients.EnableLocalLoginHelp: Allow OpenIddict local credentials (e.g. username and password)

Saml.RequireRequestDestinationHelp: Incoming requests require a destination so OpenIddict can confirm it is the intended recipient
Saml.SignAssertionsHelp: Makes OpenIddict sign both SAML messages and assertions (recommended)
Saml.EncryptAssertionsHelp: Makes OpenIddict encrypt assertions sent to the Service Provider, using their public key
Saml.RequireSignedArtifactResponsesHelp: Makes OpenIddict sign Artifact Responses to the service provider
